title: fixtures + tests: all ChatContact methods
description:

- chat_contact_set_response.json: SetResponse with updated map

Tests in methods_test.rs (after test 42):

- test 44: chat_contact_set_blocked_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies only 'blocked:true' in patch
- test 45: chat_contact_query_filters_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies filter/sort fields
- test 46: chat_contact_query_changes_returns_typed_response — body_json verifies sinceQueryState, no maxChanges key

Update README.md methods/ table with 4 new rows.
Run cargo fmt, clippy, test (expect 47+ passing). Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes including tests 43-46; 4 fixture files exist; README updated; clippy clean
